message:
style: cargo fmt on conformance_oracle_s80.rs and _s81.rs

Pure `cargo fmt` output on the two most recently added conformance
oracle suites. Single-element slice literals are collapsed back onto
one line, long SQL strings are wrapped with `let ... =` continuation
indentation, and `assert_no_mismatches(...)` two-argument calls are
reflowed to a single line per the current rustfmt profile.

No test logic changes — this brings s80 and s81 in line with earlier
oracle suites that were already formatted (see 32e730b8 for the s79
equivalent) so `cargo fmt --check` stays clean.
